description: Baby Girls 6 Pack Organza Lace Socks Every baby girl needs a pair of adorable frilly lace socks in their sock drawer so why not stock up with these great 6 pairs of Girls Organza Lace Socks that are available in 2 classic colours. These baby girl socks are Cotton Rich which will make sure that their feet remain super soft and comfortable throughout the day. There’s 2 classic colours to choose from They are: Pink and White. They have a short calf design with a cute frilly turnover lace lining on the top of the sock, The traditional sock design for a new baby girl. The 78% cotton rich content also means they are not only soft and cosy but perfect for all year round wear, keeping their feet warm in the winter and cool in the summer. These socks come in 6 pairs, 2 colours and are available in 3 sizes: 0-6 Months, 6-12 Months & 12-24 Months. They are made from 78% Cotton; 20% Polyester; 2% Elastane and are Machine Washable. Extra Product Details 6 Pack Baby Girl Lace Socks Cotton Rich Fibres Turnover Top Soft & Comfortable Cute Frilly Lace Girls Pink & White Colours Ideal For All Year Wear 3 Size Options 78% Cotton; 20% Polyester; 2% Elastane Machine Washable
